title: equisetum hyemale f. moorei
intro: Equisetum hyemale f. moorei, also known as the Horsetail, is a perennial, vascular plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family and is often used for its medicinal and health benefits. It has been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including arthritis, gout, and kidney stones, due to its high silica content and other medicinal properties. The plant's extracts have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, improve skin health, and promote urinary tract function. Equisetum hyemale f. moorei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
